REQUEST FOR JUDICIAL NOTICE IN SUPPORT OF MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION

LAW AND MOTION, 302, DEFENDANTS SONOMA TIRES, INC,. MISSION TIRES INC. AND JACK RHIEL IV'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION IS DENIED IN ITS ENTIRETY. ON THE 1ST CAUSE OF ACTION (HARRASSMENT), DEFENDANT FAILED TO MAINTAIN ITS BURDEN OF PRODUCTION; ON THE 3RD CAUSE OF ACTION (DISCRIMINATION) TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT EXIST WHETHER PLAINTIFF WAS TRANSFERRED OR DEMOTED TO THE DELIVERY DRIVER POSITION BECAUSE OF RACE. ON THE 2ND CAUSE OF ACTION (FAILURE TO PREVENT HARASSMENT) SAME REASONING AS TO THE 1ST & 3RD CAUSES OF ACTION; ON THE 4TH & 5TH CAUSES OF ACTION, THERE EXIST A TRIABLE ISSUE OF MATERIAL FACT. THE MOTION IS DENIED AS TO THE 6TH CAUSE OF ACTION FOR IIED AND THE PRAYER FOR PUNITIVE DMAGES BASED ON THE ABOVE RULING. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER PURSUANT TO CCP 437 C(G) AND CRC 3.1312). JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: KARLA ELLIS-DAVIS , CSR # 12998 (302/MJM)

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS SONOMA TIRES, INC., MISSION TIRES, INC., JACK RHIEL IV'S MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE IS DENIED. PURSUANT TO CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE 396(B), PLAINTIFF IS ENTITLED TO AN AWARD OF ATTORNEY FEES AND COSTS IN THE AMOUNT OF $2500. COUNSEL FOR DEFENDANTS SONOMA TIRES, INC., MISSION TIRES, INC. AND JACK RHIEL IV SHALL PAY THIS AMOUNT. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (SEE ORDER FOR DETAILS OF THE RULING.) JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER #5976.

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS SONOMA TIRES, INC, MISSION TIRES INC AND JACK RHIEL IV MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE IS CONTINUED TO MARCH 26, 2013, TO GIVE THE OPPOSING PARTY AN OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH SAN FRANCISCO LOCAL RULE 2.6B. THE OPPOSING PARTY SHALL PROVIDE COURTESY COPIES OF THE OPPOSITION BY MARCH 5, 2013. PLEASE ATTACH A COVER LETTER REFLECTING THE NEW HEARING DATE. IN ADDITION, IT APPEARS THAT THE OPPOSITION, ALTHOUGH REFERRED TO IN THE REPLY BRIEF,WAS NEVER FILED. THE OPPOSING PARTY IS TO FILE THE OPPOSITION IN THE CLERK'S OFFICE. JUDGE: MARLA J. Off Calendar Oct-30-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANTS DARRIN A DOLLE, INC., R & A ASHER, INC. AND TWINKLE STAR, INC.'s MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION IS Off calendar at the request of the moving party per email to the court. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Karla Ellis-Davis , CSR # 12998 =302/MJM

MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION
Off Calendar Oct-30-2013 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. KEN LAU OF DHILLON & SMITH LLP, TEL. NO. 433-1700 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. MATTHEW N. MONG OF CHRISTMAN KELLEY & CLARKE, TEL. NO. (805) 884-9922 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANTS SONOMA TIRES, MISSION TIRES AND JACK RHIEL INCORPORATED BY TELEPHONE APPEARANCE.

RULING - A R G U E D; DEFENDANTS SONOMA TIRES, INC,. MISSION TIRES INC. AND JACK RHIEL IV'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION IS DENIED IN ITS ENTIRETY. ON THE 1ST CAUSE OF ACTION (HARRASSMENT), DEFENDANT FAILED TO MAINTAIN ITS BURDEN OF PRODUCTION; ON THE 3RD CAUSE OF ACTION (DISCRIMINATION) TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT EXIST WHETHER PLAINTIFF WAS TRANSFERRED OR DEMOTED TO THE DELIVERY DRIVER POSITION BECAUSE OF RACE. ON THE 2ND CAUSE OF ACTION (FAILURE TO PREVENT HARASSMENT) SAME REASONING AS TO THE 1ST & 3RD CAUSES OF ACTION; ON THE 4TH & 5TH CAUSES OF ACTION, THERE EXIST A TRIABLE ISSUE OF MATERIAL FACT. THE MOTION IS DENIED AS TO THE 6TH CAUSE OF ACTION FOR IIED AND THE PRAYER FOR PUNITIVE DMAGES BASED ON THE ABOVE RULING. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order pursuant to CCP 437 C(G) AND CRC 3.1312). Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert;
Court Reporter: Karla Ellis-Davis , CSR # 12998 =(302/MJM)

MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE
Off Calendar Mar-26-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: priya brandes, esq., 415.433.1700, for plaintiff alexandria portillo; No other appearances.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS SONOMA TIRES, INC., MISSION TIRES, INC., JACK RHIEL IV'S MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE is Denied. Venue is proper in San Francisco County because Defendant Mission Tires, Inc. is a resident of San Francisco County. Code of Civil Procedure 395. Defendants have not yet answered and cannot make a motion to transfer pursuant to Code of Civil Procedure 397( c) based on the convenience of witnesses and ends of justice. Even if it were timely, moving Defendants have not met their burden. Pursuant to Code of Civil Procedure 396(b), Plaintiff is entitled to an award of attorney fees and costs in the amount of $2500. Counsel for Defendants Sonoma Tires, Inc., Mission Tires, Inc. and Jack Rhiel IV shall pay this amount. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Sherry Sawyer #5976.
